name: Cross-tracker fallback modal dismiss
preconditions: Test runner must pass -PsimulateRuTrackerUnhealthy=true so the modal appears.

falsifiability_protocol.mutation_step: Mutate the dismiss handler to silently retry on RuTor anyway (call sdk.search() with the alt tracker as if 'accept' had been tapped).
falsifiability_protocol.expected_failure: RuTor results DO render after Cancel; 'Results from RuTor' banner is visible; assertIsNotDisplayed fires.
falsifiability_protocol.revert_step: Restore the dismiss handler so it surfaces the failure UI without re-issuing the search.

operator_run_instructions: Capture screenshots: (a) modal with Cancel tap, (b) Snackbar 'Search failed', (c) absence of RuTor results.
Perform falsifiability mutation, re-run, capture verbatim failure assertion, revert.
